page.title: Marbella Booze Cruise for Hen Parties: Fun on the Sea

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella booze cruise hen party from Puerto Banús. Private charter, open bar, DJ-friendly, from €749/2h. Celebrate on the sea with your crew.
data.summary: A Marbella booze cruise hen party is the ultimate way to celebrate before the wedding. Private charters from Puerto Banús include skipper, open bar, and DJ-friendly sound systems for up to 12 guests.
key_facts: Private charter from Puerto Banús, Marbella
Fleet includes Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) and Azimut 39 (€749/2h) for up to 11 pax
Mangusta 80 (24m) available from €4,719/4h, includes free jet ski
Open bar: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava included
Licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and 21% IVA all included
DJ-friendly: most boats have Bluetooth/USB audio systems
No deposit needed; full refund up to 72h before departure
Add-ons: prosecco, decorations, catering available on request

faq.q: What is included in a Marbella booze cruise hen party?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and an open bar with water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava. Light snacks are also provided. You can bring your own playlist and decorations. Add-ons like prosecco, themed decorations, or catering are available on request.

faq.q: How many guests can join a hen party boat in Marbella?
faq.a: Our fleet ranges from 5 to 12 guests. The Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 take up to 11 pax, while the Mangusta 80 (24m) accommodates 12 pax. For smaller groups, the speedboat (6 pax) or Dubhe (5 pax) are great options. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Can we play our own music on the boat?
faq.a: Yes, all our boats have Bluetooth or USB audio systems. You can connect your phone and play your own playlist. There's no DJ equipment on board, but the sound system is more than enough for a party atmosphere. Bring a portable speaker if you want extra bass.

faq.q: How much does a Marbella booze cruise hen party cost?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. For a longer party, 8 hours costs €2,299. The Mangusta 80 (24m) starts at €4,719 for 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, drinks, and taxes.

faq.q: Can we bring our own alcohol?
faq.a: No, outside alcohol is not permitted. However, we provide a generous open bar with beer, white wine, cava, soft drinks, and water. You can request prosecco or other drinks as an add-on. This keeps the experience hassle-free and ensures safety on board.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for hen party charters?
faq.a: We offer a full refund up to 72 hours before departure. For cancellations within 72 hours, a 50% refund is available. No deposit is required to book — we only need your confirmation. Contact us via WhatsApp for last-minute changes.

faq.q: Where do the boats depart from?
faq.a: All our boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. You'll meet the skipper at the port, and the boat will be ready for boarding. We recommend arriving 15 minutes early to settle in and start your celebration on time.

faq.q: Can we swim or stop for a swim break?
faq.a: Yes, weather permitting. Popular spots include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or the coast near Cabopino. The skipper will anchor in a safe area where you can jump in. Life jackets are available, and the crew ensures a safe environment.

data.body_html:
Planning a Marbella booze cruise hen party? You've found the right fleet. From Puerto Banús, we offer private charters with open bar, skipper, and enough space for your whole crew. Whether you want a 2-hour sunset spin or a full-day party with a jet ski, our boats are ready. No deposits, no hidden fees — just honest pricing and a great time on the Mediterranean.

Why Choose a Booze Cruise for Your Hen Party in Marbella?

A booze cruise is the ultimate pre-wedding celebration. You get private transport, a floating bar, and panoramic views of the Costa del Sol. Marbella's coastline — from the Golden Mile to Estepona — is best seen from the water. Plus, with a licensed skipper, you can relax and focus on the fun. No driving, no stress, just champagne and sea air.

Our Fleet for Hen Parties

We have boats for every group size. All depart from Puerto Banús and include skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks. Here's what's available:

BoatLengthMax PaxPrice from
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2h
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719/4h (incl. jet ski)
Speedboat7m6On request

For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (24m) is a showstopper. It includes a free jet ski, which the bride-to-be can ride along the coast. All prices include 21% IVA and open bar.

What's Included in Your Charter

  • Licensed skipper (speaks English & Spanish)
  • Fuel for the full charter duration
  • Open bar: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (chips, nuts, olives)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Bluetooth/USB audio system for your playlist

You can add prosecco, themed decorations, or a catering platter — just ask via WhatsApp when booking.

Popular Hen Party Routes from Puerto Banús

Your skipper will suggest a route based on weather and your preferences. Typical stops include:

  • Cala del Faro — a quiet cove for swimming and photos
  • Cala Cortés — crystal-clear water near Marbella
  • Cabopino — sandy beach with beach clubs
  • Estepona coast — scenic views of the old town

You can also cruise past the mega-yachts in Puerto Banús and wave at the crowd. The bride will feel like a celebrity.

How to Book Your Marbella Booze Cruise Hen Party

Booking is simple. No deposit required. Just contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and boat. We'll confirm availability and send you a booking link. You can cancel free up to 72 hours before departure. For last-minute bookings, we often have availability on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39.

Check our full guide to boat rental Marbella for more ideas.

What to Bring

  • Sunscreen (SPF 50+ recommended)
  • Towel and swimwear
  • Sunglasses and hat
  • Your phone for music and photos
  • A light jacket for sunset cruises
  • Decorations (balloons, banners) — but no confetti

We provide coolers, ice, and glasses. Just bring your party spirit.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a Marbella booze cruise hen party?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and an open bar with water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava. Light snacks are also provided. You can bring your own playlist and decorations. Add-ons like prosecco, themed decorations, or catering are available on request.

How many guests can join a hen party boat in Marbella?

Our fleet ranges from 5 to 12 guests. The Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 take up to 11 pax, while the Mangusta 80 (24m) accommodates 12 pax. For smaller groups, the speedboat (6 pax) or Dubhe (5 pax) are great options. All depart from Puerto Banús.

Can we play our own music on the boat?

Yes, all our boats have Bluetooth or USB audio systems. You can connect your phone and play your own playlist. There's no DJ equipment on board, but the sound system is more than enough for a party atmosphere. Bring a portable speaker if you want extra bass.

How much does a Marbella booze cruise hen party cost?

Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. For a longer party, 8 hours costs €2,299. The Mangusta 80 (24m) starts at €4,719 for 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, drinks, and taxes.

Can we bring our own alcohol?

No, outside alcohol is not permitted. However, we provide a generous open bar with beer, white wine, cava, soft drinks, and water. You can request prosecco or other drinks as an add-on. This keeps the experience hassle-free and ensures safety on board.

What is the cancellation policy for hen party charters?

We offer a full refund up to 72 hours before departure. For cancellations within 72 hours, a 50% refund is available. No deposit is required to book — we only need your confirmation. Contact us via WhatsApp for last-minute changes.

Where do the boats depart from?

All our boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. You'll meet the skipper at the port, and the boat will be ready for boarding. We recommend arriving 15 minutes early to settle in and start your celebration on time.

Can we swim or stop for a swim break?

Yes, weather permitting. Popular spots include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or the coast near Cabopino. The skipper will anchor in a safe area where you can jump in. Life jackets are available, and the crew ensures a safe environment.
